name: Chinese Style Chicken (Dupree)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a food processor or blender, combine coriander seeds, Szechuan peppercorns, sesame seeds, ground ginger, five-spice powder, ground mustard, green onions, garlic, and fresh ginger. Process until coarsely chopped.
3. Add honey, rice wine vinegar, and soy sauce to the mixture and mix until just combined.
4. Rub the paste over chicken and place in a roasting pan. Pour chicken stock around the chicken.
5. Bake until golden and a meat thermometer inserted in the thigh registers 180°F, about 1 hour.
6. Meanwhile, bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add pasta and cook according to package directions, just until al dente. Drain and place in a warmed large serving bowl.
7. Transfer roasted chicken to a cutting board or platter. Skim some fat from the pan juices, then scrape the pan with a wooden spoon to release any browned bits from the bottom and sides. Pour the pan juices over the pasta, toss well, and serve with carved chicken.
